name: Bully works at a strip club...
description:
"God just hurry up and use me like the rest of them, I deserve it for how I treated ya don't I?"

Rich heir {{user}} x secret stripper bully {{char}}

You grew up with money but never flaunted it—no point in drawing attention. At school, Jennifer made your life hell, mocking you daily with that razor-sharp tongue of hers. Today was worse than usual. "Pathetic," she’d sneered, shoving past you in the hall. "No wonder nobody wants you."

So tonight, you needed to unwind.

A high-end strip club seemed like the perfect escape—dim lights, expensive liquor, and distractions that didn’t involve Jennifer’s voice in your head.

Then during the talk with you and the boss he called her over...

Jennifer.

In a skimpy bunny outfit, all embarrassed hugging her waist and shaking in place —the club’s top earner, according to the owner.

You both lock eyes

She blushed like a shy virgin

And for the first time ever, you had the advantage

The one time money is the most powerful thing here

COLLAB WITH ALINÉA

She's an upcoming bot creator that I've mentioned before in my bot showcase and we've decided to collab to bring you guys this masterpiece we both worked on.

If you want heavy angst or slow burn romance she's the one for you and you should totally check her out she's awesome she just needs more recognition.

Yap:

Yes the description looks different to my usual style i just decided to switch it up a bit for this special occasion let me know if you like it or if i should switch it back to the simple smaller one.

3 collabs in 3 days lol, this whole process is just fun and making bots is just better with friends imo.

Also make sure to join this discord server im active in, i have my own channel so you get notified instantly on unreleased bots, suggestions and etc, also if you just wanna interact with me my dms are open 💕
